top_signals.title: Strait of Hormuz Traffic Fades to a Crawl After Supertankers Exit
top_signals.summary: Commercial shipping through the Strait of Hormuz dwindled to only a few mostly Iran-linked vessels crossing on Wednesday, underscoring the stop-start nature of traffic through the world’s most vital energy chokepoint.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Taiwan chip stocks climb after Nvidia announces $150 billion spending plans
top_signals.summary: Mainland China-based chip giants such as Cambricon saw their shares tumble on Wednesday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: U.S. crude trims losses after White House denies Iran state media report about Hormuz opening
top_signals.summary: U.S. crude oil prices trim losses as traders assess whether U.S. is nearing a deal with Iran that would restore traffic in the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Results of the March 2026 survey on credit terms and conditions in euro-denominated securities financing and OTC derivatives markets (SESFOD)
